content.en:
Among the fragments.

Ye Tian, the replica body of the Vajra Snake, waited for some days, and did not find that other Vajra Snakes were here, so he was ready to leave here first and look for the headquarters location of the Vajra Snake Clan.

Swish!

The Vajra snake copied its body and flew out, entering the shock current of the boundary gap of the territorial waters.

At this time, Ye Tian found that the body of the Vajra snake could move and turn in the shock flow, and it was very little affected by the shock flow.

It was as if the shock current hit the skin of the Vajra snake and was swept away by an inexplicable force.

"Adapt!"

Ye Tian guessed that it should be that the Vajra snake clan had survived in the territorial waters for an endless long time, causing their bodies to gradually adapt to the environment here, and naturally adapt to the shock current.

For the rest of the day, he wandered here as a replica of the Vajra snake.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered a blood transformation realm creature, and the other party was not a Vajra snake clan.

"At least three Blood Transformation Realm creatures!"

Ye Tian judged.

And after this blood transformation creature saw Ye Tian, it directly avoided it and did not attack.

Obviously, the Vajra Snake belongs to the overlord in this area, and the Blood Transformation Realm creatures passing by do not dare to provoke, even if it is a Vajra Snake in the Fusion Realm, they do not dare to kill it.

Therefore, there would be no danger for Ye Tian to wander here as a Vajra snake, unless he encountered special circumstances.

"Found other Vajra snakes!"

Ye Tian saw that the six-headed Blood Transformation Realm Vajra Snake was shuttling, so he immediately flew over.

At this time, the six-headed Vajra snake also saw Ye Tian.

"What kid is this, who ran out before he reached the Blood Transformation Realm?"

A Blood Transformation Realm Vajra Snake wondered.

There are many Vajra snakes in this area, and some Vajra snakes roam the outside world all year round, and it is normal not to know each other.

Ye Tian flew over and behaved dumbfounded, no matter how these King Kong snakes asked, he couldn't tell or know.

Because there is a problem with his identity, if he meets a vajra snake who knows this identity, what he says nonsense will expose the situation.

Of course.

Even if he really encounters a vajra snake who knows this identity, he has a way to deal with it, and he will not be suspected in a short time.

Anyway, he didn't stay in the Vajra snake clan for a long time, so it wasn't a big problem.

After some inquiry, the six-headed vajra snake deliberated and finally made a decision.

"This little guy is not very intelligent, it is estimated that he was abandoned, take it back to the clan land directly, or wander around in the outside world, maybe he will be swallowed by some passing Blood Transformation Realm creature!" a Blood Transformation Realm Vajra Snake proposed.

"So be it!"

The other Blood Transformation Realm Vajra Snakes also nodded.

In this way, Ye Tian was taken by them and went to the land of the King Kong Snake.

......

"It's here!"

The six-headed Blood Transformation Realm Vajra Snake brought Ye Tian to a huge fragment, this piece of broken jade was no less than the Hidden Sea Fragment and the True Dragon Realm Ruins.

At this moment, he saw a lot of Blood Transformation Realm Vajra snakes coming in and out.

"The Vajra Snake of So Many Blood Transformation Realms !!"

Ye Tian was extremely shocked.

Compared to the Vajra Snake Clan, the territorial waters of Wanlong are simply too weak!

"If the Blood Transformation Realm of Wanlong's territorial waters dares to go deep into the territorial sea boundary rift, the chance of death is too high!"

Ye Tian sighed.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian entered this huge fragment, and then the six-headed Vajra snake left.

For them, it was enough to be able to bring Ye Tian here, and they would not continue to arrange a place for Ye Tian to live.

Anyway, this piece of fragment is huge, and you can just find a place to be your lair.

......

Ye Tian wandered around the territory of the Vajra Snake and did not attract the attention of the other Vajra Snakes.

After all, in the territory of the Vajra Snake, it is too normal for a Fusion Realm Vajra Snake to run around.

"Three Blood Transformation Realms!"

"Four Blood Transformation Realms!"

"Four Blood Transformation Realms!"

Ye Tian explored all the way and found no less than three Blood Transformation Realm Vajra Snakes, but so far he had not found five Blood Transformation Realm Vajra Snakes.

However, he knew very well that the Vajra Snake Clan definitely had five Blood Transformation Realm Vajra Snakes.

This clan is simply too powerful!

Of course, the Vajra Snake clan is only extremely powerful in his eyes, and it is not necessarily powerful in the cracks of the territorial waters.

Ye Tian didn't forget his purpose, which was to collect that golden liquid.

Soon, he found the golden liquid.

In the Vajra Snake Territory, this golden liquid is abundant and not precious.

After his understanding, this golden liquid was called the Golden Muscle Fluid by the Vajra Snake Clan!

The golden muscle fluid is the basic substance for the King Kong snake family, and the newly born King Kong snake will be soaked in the gold muscle fluid, constantly refining the body and boiling the flesh and blood.

"The Golden Muscle Fluid can't help the Vajra Snake break through to the Blood Transformation Realm!"

This is what Ye Tian knows.

The reason why this is the case, he also guessed that it should be because of the cultivation system and race.

The Vajra Snake clan does not need to temper the heart and let the heart metamorphose, they only need to let the Vajra Snake's bloodline be stimulated, so as to reach the blood transformation realm.

And it is not difficult for the Vajra Snake clan to reach the Blood Transformation Realm, unless the bloodline is extremely weak, they will not be able to break through to the Blood Transformation Realm.

Otherwise, relying on a long period of cultivation, the Vajra Snake has a great hope of becoming a Blood Transformation Realm.

It can be said that the Vajra Snake Clan is the Blood Transformation Realm Race!

"The Golden Muscle Serum is not too precious to the Vajra Snake Clan, I can get a lot of it!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

So, he spent the following years secretly collecting gold muscle fluid.

this day.

He had collected enough Golden Muscle Fluid to leave the fragment and hand it over to his real body to copy the body.

......

Territorial sea boundary gap in the impact current.

Ye Tian's Vajra Snake copy body slowly moved, gradually moving away from the Vajra Snake's territory.

After a long time, he looked around, and when he saw that there were no other Vajra snakes, he began to merge with the real copy body.

Not long after, the two replica bodies merged.

Golden muscle fluid is here!

After that, the Vajra snake copied its body and returned the same way.

"With so much golden muscle fluid, it should help me complete the transformation of my heart, so that the immeasurable blood can undergo a blood transformation and become a blood transformation realm Heavenly Ancestor!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Among a small fragment, Ye Tian was in retreat here.

Grunt!

He swallowed a lot of golden muscle fluid in one gulp, and then quickly refined it to temper his heart.

Bang!!!!

The heart was quickly tempered, and a violent concussion sound was released, which shook the surrounding void and shattered the earth.

But gradually, he controlled the tempering rhythm of his heart and did not affect his surroundings.

As the years passed, Ye Tian's heart became stronger and stronger, and he was getting closer and closer to the transformation of his heart.
